calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Candence Yount. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Dec-21-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maura Balducchi.
Leonardo Drubach, Esq. for Petitioner: Jacqueline Calderon, present as Guardian at litem for: Arlene Ortiz, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees and costs $1,091.00
Reimbursement of Medical Expenses $1,250.00
Additional medical expenses $1,904.00
A net balance of $755.00 to be held in bank account for the benefit of the minor, until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
